stories.title: Add inline file summaries to Workspace CaseFilesSection
stories.description: In frontend/src/components/workspace/CaseFilesSection.jsx, display the file.summary field below each filename in the file list. The summary data is already returned by evidenceAPI.list(). Show full summary text below the filename with text-[11px] text-light-500 styling. Only show if file.summary exists. Same pattern used in CaseManagementView.jsx.
acceptance_criteria: File summaries appear below filenames in Workspace file list
No summary shown for unprocessed files

stories.title: Improve document summary LLM prompt and input size
stories.description: In ingestion/scripts/ingestion.py, find Step 8 document summary generation. Change summary_text from text[:5000] to text[:15000]. Rewrite the summary_prompt to request: key facts, entities mentioned with roles, financial figures and amounts, important dates, and relationships between entities. Structure as sections. Keep output to 4-8 sentences.
acceptance_criteria: Summary prompt requests structured output with key facts, entities, financials, dates
Input context increased from 5000 to 15000 characters
python3 syntax check passes on ingestion.py

stories.title: Move financial search bar outside collapsible filter panel
stories.description: In frontend/src/components/financial/FinancialView.jsx, extract the search inputs (text search, date range picker, entity filter dropdown) from inside FinancialFilterPanel and place them in a persistent bar between the stats cards and the table. The filter chips (Transaction Type, Category) stay inside the collapsible panel. The search bar should always be visible even when filters are collapsed.
acceptance_criteria: Search bar (text, date range, entity) is always visible above the table
Filter chips remain inside collapsible Filters section
Search works the same as before

stories.title: Add transaction ID column to financial table
stories.description: In frontend/src/components/financial/FinancialTable.jsx, add a '#' column as the first column after the checkbox. Display a sequential number: (currentPage - 1) * rowsPerPage + index + 1. Also add the ID to CSV export if one exists. Column should be narrow (w-10) and right-aligned.
acceptance_criteria: Sequential ID number appears in first column after checkbox
IDs are page-aware (page 2 starts at 101 if 100 per page)

stories.title: Filter audit log by current case ID
stories.description: The audit log in the workspace shows actions from ALL cases. Find the audit log section component in frontend/src/components/workspace/ and the backend endpoint that serves audit log entries. Add case_id filter parameter to the backend query. Ensure the frontend passes the current caseId when fetching. The system_log_service already logs case_id in the details field — filter on that.
acceptance_criteria: Audit log only shows actions for the currently selected case
Other cases' actions are not visible

stories.title: Fix attach-to-theory dialog z-index behind map
stories.description: Find the 'attach to theory' dialog component (likely in workspace components). Its z-index is lower than the Leaflet map layer (z-index ~400-1000). Set the dialog's z-index to z-[9999] or z-50 to ensure it renders above the map.
acceptance_criteria: Attach to theory dialog appears above the map

stories.title: Add edit mode for existing investigative notes
stories.description: In frontend/src/components/workspace/InvestigativeNotesSection.jsx, add an Edit button to each note card. On click, open AddInvestigativeNoteModal pre-populated with the existing note content. Check if backend has PUT /workspace/{case_id}/notes/{note_id} endpoint. If not, add one in backend/routers/workspace.py that calls workspace_service.save_note() with the existing note_id to update in place. Dispatch notes-refresh event after save.
acceptance_criteria: Edit button visible on each note card
Clicking edit opens modal with pre-filled content
Saving updates the existing note (not creating a new one)

stories.title: Compact witness matrix with expand/collapse and interviewer field
stories.description: Three changes: (1) In WitnessMatrixSection.jsx, change default view to show only name, credibility rating, status, phone, address per witness. Add expand/collapse per witness for statement, risk assessment, strategy notes. (2) In backend/routers/workspace.py WitnessCreate model and WitnessModal.jsx, add interviewed_by field (string). (3) Rename section header from 'Witness Interview' to 'Interviews & Statements' in WorkspaceView.jsx.
acceptance_criteria: Witness list shows compact view by default
interviewed_by field exists in modal and is saved

stories.title: Fix upload failure during concurrent ingestion
stories.description: In backend/routers/evidence.py, the upload endpoint may acquire a lock or conflict with active processing. Uploads (file storage) should never block on processing (ingestion). Ensure the upload endpoint doesn't hold the case processing lock. Add error recovery so if the upload state gets corrupted, subsequent uploads still work without server restart. Check evidence_service.py for any shared state that could block.
acceptance_criteria: Uploading files while ingestion is running succeeds
Error state doesn't persist — subsequent uploads work

stories.title: Fix blurry graph and irrelevant events in snapshot export
stories.description: In frontend/src/components/workspace/CaseExportModal.jsx: (1) Find html2canvas calls and increase the scale parameter from 1 to 2 for retina-quality graph capture. (2) Find where timeline events are included in the export — filter to only include events relevant to the snapshot (matching the snapshot's timeline data) rather than all case events.
acceptance_criteria: Exported graph image is sharp (2x resolution)
Only snapshot-relevant events appear in export

stories.title: Clarify or simplify faded nodes in AI result graph
stories.description: In the AI result graph rendering (likely in App.jsx or GraphView.jsx where result graph nodes are rendered), nodes with lower relevance appear faded/dimmed. This confuses users. Either: (a) add a small legend near the result graph explaining 'Brighter = more relevant to your question', or (b) remove opacity-based fading entirely and use a subtle border color difference instead (e.g., thicker blue border for high relevance).
acceptance_criteria: Result graph nodes have clear visual explanation or simplified styling
Users can understand why some nodes look different

stories.title: Graph legend entity type click queries full graph not just visible 100
stories.description: In frontend/src/components/GraphView.jsx, when the graph is capped at 100 nodes, clicking an Entity Type in the legend currently only filters the visible 100. Change it to call the backend with a type filter to fetch ALL nodes of that type and add them to the spotlight graph. May need a new or modified backend endpoint: GET /graph/cases/{case_id}/nodes?type=Person. The returned nodes should be merged into the existing graph display.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking Person in legend fetches all Person nodes from backend
Fetched nodes appear in the spotlight graph
Works when graph is capped at 100

stories.title: Consolidate AI facts and insights into grouped/collapsible view
stories.description: In the entity detail panel (likely NodeDetails or similar component), AI facts and insights are listed individually and overwhelming. Group them by category (financial, identity, relationship, location, etc.) into collapsible sections with counts like 'Financial (12)'. Alternatively, add a 'Summary' tab that consolidates all facts into a single AI-generated paragraph.
acceptance_criteria: Facts/insights are grouped or summarized instead of listed individually
User can still see individual facts if needed (via expand)

stories.title: Backend: Add Findings CRUD endpoints and storage
stories.description: In backend/routers/workspace.py, add FindingCreate and FindingUpdate Pydantic models with fields: title (str), content (str), linked_evidence_ids (Optional[List[str]]), linked_entity_keys (Optional[List[str]]). Add CRUD endpoints: POST /workspace/{case_id}/findings, GET /workspace/{case_id}/findings, PUT /workspace/{case_id}/findings/{finding_id}, DELETE /workspace/{case_id}/findings/{finding_id}. In backend/services/workspace_service.py, add findings storage methods following the same pattern as notes (dict-based, JSON file persistence).
acceptance_criteria: POST creates a finding and returns finding_id
GET returns all findings for a case

stories.title: Frontend: Add FindingsSection component to workspace
stories.description: Create frontend/src/components/workspace/FindingsSection.jsx following the pattern of InvestigativeNotesSection.jsx. Display findings as expandable cards with title, content, and linked evidence/entities. Add 'Add Finding' button that opens a FindingModal. Create FindingModal.jsx with title input, content textarea, and evidence/entity linking (searchable dropdown from case files and entities). Add FindingsSection to WorkspaceView.jsx after Case Deadlines section. Add findings-refresh event pattern.
acceptance_criteria: Can create, view, edit, delete findings
Can link evidence files and entities to findings

stories.title: Add bulk entity merge from Table view
stories.description: In the Table view component, allow selecting 3+ entities via checkboxes. Show a 'Merge Selected (N)' button when 2+ are selected. Create BulkMergeModal.jsx showing all selected entities with a target name input and type selector. On confirm, call a new or extended backend endpoint that merges all source entities into one target. Backend should combine summaries, facts, and insights from all sources. Dispatch entities-refresh event after merge.
acceptance_criteria: Can select 3+ entities in table view
Modal lets user set target name and type
All selected entities merge into one

stories.title: Reorganize workspace sections and rename audit log
stories.description: In frontend/src/components/WorkspaceView.jsx, reorder sections to: Case Deadlines & Tasks, Findings, Client Profile & Exposure, Investigative Theories, Notes, Snapshots, Witness Matrix, Entity Summary, Pinned Evidence, Case Files, Graph, Timeline, Map, Audit Log. Reorder the left pane navigation to match. Rename 'Investigation Timeline' to 'Comprehensive Audit Log'. Remove 'Chain of Custody' label. Update the export to exclude audit log and timeline sections.
acceptance_criteria: Workspace sections appear in the specified order

stories.title: Cost Ledger: add case filter, PDF export, consolidate line items
stories.description: Find the Cost Ledger component (likely a modal or section in the workspace). (1) Add case name/ID display and filter so costs can be attributed per case. (2) Consolidate duplicate 'Document Ingestion: None' entries for the same document into a single line with total cost. (3) Add PDF export button using the same WeasyPrint pattern as financial_export_service.py.
acceptance_criteria: PDF export downloads a formatted ledger

stories.title: Add source citations and confidentiality labels to snapshot reports
stories.description: In the snapshot export/report generation logic, for each event or entity in the report, add a citation showing which source document it came from (the Document node's name). Add a header and footer to exported reports: 'CONFIDENTIAL — Attorney Work Product — Privileged & Confidential'.
acceptance_criteria: Each event/entity in report cites its source document
Confidentiality header and footer appear on every page

stories.title: Report section ordering and brand guidelines
stories.description: In the export modal, add UI for reordering report sections (drag-to-reorder or up/down arrows). Apply brand guidelines to exported reports: blue color HEX #222248, title font Cinzel Black, body font Lato. Import fonts via Google Fonts link or embed in the report template.
acceptance_criteria: User can reorder sections before export
Titles in Cinzel Black, body in Lato

stories.title: Add case archiving
stories.description: Backend: Add archived boolean field to case model (default false). Add PUT /cases/{case_id}/archive and /unarchive endpoints. Frontend: In CaseManagementView.jsx, add Archive button to case actions (trash icon area). Add 'Show Archived' toggle to case list header (default off). Archived cases hidden from default list but visible when toggled.

stories.title: Improve text message processing in ingestion pipeline
stories.description: In ingestion/scripts/ingestion.py, add detection for common text message export formats (iOS Messages export, WhatsApp .txt export, CSV format). Parse conversation threads extracting: timestamp, sender, recipient, message content. Create Person entities for participants. Structure the extracted data as a conversation timeline for graph ingestion.
